sentences.arabic: الْمَشْيُ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ يُسَاعِدُ عَلَى تَحْسِينِ الْمِزَاجِ وَتَقْوِيَةِ الْقَلْبِ.
sentences.translation: Šetnja svako jutro pomaže u poboljšanju raspoloženja i jačanju srca.
sentences.translationEn: Walking every morning helps improve the mood and strengthen the heart.

sentences.arabic: أَذْهَبُ إِلَى الْحَدِيقَةِ لِمُدَّةِ ثَلَاثِينَ دَقِيقَةً كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Idem u park na trideset minuta svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: I go to the park for thirty minutes every day.

sentences.arabic: الرِّيَاضَةُ الْمُنْتَظَمَةُ تَحْمِينَا مِنْ أَمْرَاضٍ كَثِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Redovno vježbanje nas štiti od mnogih bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: Regular exercise protects us from many diseases.
